acl.Description: Canned ACL to be applied to the state file

allowed_account_ids.Description: List of allowed AWS account IDs.

bucket.Description: The name of the S3 bucket

custom_ca_bundle.Description: File containing custom root and intermediate certificates.

dynamodb_endpoint.Description: A custom endpoint for the DynamoDB API

dynamodb_table.Description: DynamoDB table for state locking and consistency

ec2_metadata_service_endpoint.Description: Address of the EC2 metadata service (IMDS) endpoint to use.

ec2_metadata_service_endpoint_mode.Description: Mode to use in communicating with the metadata service.

encrypt.Description: Whether to enable server side encryption of the state file

endpoint.Description: A custom endpoint for the S3 API

forbidden_account_ids.Description: List of forbidden AWS account IDs.

http_proxy.Description: URL of a proxy to use for HTTP requests when accessing the AWS API.

https_proxy.Description: URL of a proxy to use for HTTPS requests when accessing the AWS API.

iam_endpoint.Description: A custom endpoint for the IAM API

insecure.Description: Whether to explicitly allow the backend to perform insecure SSL requests.

key.Description: The path to the state file inside the bucket

kms_key_id.Description: The ARN of a KMS Key to use for encrypting the state

max_retries.Description: The maximum number of times an AWS API request is retried on retryable failure.

no_proxy.Description: Comma-separated list of hosts that should not use HTTP or HTTPS proxies.

region.Description: AWS region of the S3 Bucket and DynamoDB Table (if used).

shared_config_files.Description: List of paths to shared config files

shared_credentials_file.Description: Path to a shared credentials file

shared_credentials_files.Description: List of paths to shared credentials files

skip_credentials_validation.Description: Skip the credentials validation via STS API. Useful for testing and for AWS API implementations that do not have STS available.

skip_metadata_api_check.Description: Skip the AWS Metadata API check.

skip_region_validation.Description: Skip static validation of region name.

skip_requesting_account_id.Description: Skip the requesting account ID. Useful for AWS API implementations that do not have the IAM, STS API, or metadata API.

skip_s3_checksum.Description: Do not include checksum when uploading S3 Objects. Useful for some S3-Compatible APIs.

sse_customer_key.Description: The base64-encoded encryption key to use for server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C).

sts_endpoint.Description: A custom endpoint for the STS API

use_dualstack_endpoint.Description: Force the backend to resolve endpoints with DualStack capability.

use_fips_endpoint.Description: Force the backend to resolve endpoints with FIPS capability.

use_lockfile.Description: Whether to use a lockfile for locking the state file.

workspace_key_prefix.Description: The prefix applied to the non-default state path inside the bucket.
